items.title: What Is Considered a Good Stock Dividend? 3 Healthcare Stocks That Fit the Bill.
items.description: Healthcare stocks in the S&P 500 offer an average dividend yield of 1.8%.

items.title: Trump: Divert Federal Funds From 'Money Sucking' Health Insurers
items.description: President Donald Trump wrote that "hundreds of billions" in federal funding should be shifted from "money sucking" health insurers to the public.
